comment: tactical-diplomat bot band for --sim 5000 --policy tactical-pacifist. RE-BASELINED in batch 13 (the mercy-economy ride-alongs; goblin awe + cheese + potion biology + becalm dividend). THE FLIP STILL HOLDS: diplomacy remains the reliable path, ABOVE violence (diplomat 51.0% vs the violent bot's 33.9%). Batch 13 turned spam-talk into per-enemy nerve — goblins now becalm through AWE (walk backward while talking) or a cheese bribe, not easy talk-spam — which is why both tactical bots dropped from batch 12 (diplomat 59.7%->46% pre-tune). T7 lowered the goblin awe_threshold 3->2 (the single measured lever), landing the diplomat back in the arc's 50-60 target: wins 2549/5000 (51.0%), deaths_combat ~2437, deaths_dark 14, stuck 0, kills_total 0. The 60 ceiling keeps the design's own 'too generous' guard (pull the goblin awe_threshold / becalm dividend back if diplomacy ever crests ~65%). Final batch-13 [TUNE] values: goblin awe_threshold 2 (ogre stays 3), becalm_dividend 2 (small per the arc guard, a flavor touch not a balance lever), cheese stay+roll (guaranteed stay, receptivity-rolled becalm), potion biology-coded (heals rats, enrages goblinoids). Calibrated for 5000 seeds.
